label: Multi-stage verification pipeline with conditional execution (structural → compile → execute → smoke test → lint)
Structural validation with auto-fix attempt (placeholder detection, truncation markers, balanced braces)
Calibrated confidence scoring with weighted stage contributions (compile 35%, execute 25%, test 25%, lint 10%, auto-fix -5%)
Hard-fail gatekeeper with decompose strategy (GovernorAction enum: Accept/Retry/HardFail, shouldHardFail logic, decompose strategies)
Language-specific compile/execute commands with timeout (15s compile, 10s execute, 500-char error truncation)
